scripts.gate:backend: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check src tests && .venv/bin/lint-imports && .venv/bin/python scripts/lint_naming.py && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q
scripts.gate:frontend: npm run test -w web && npm run test -w potato && npm run test -w packages/doc && npm run test -w packages/lib && npm run test -w packages/ui && npm run test -w packages/test-utils
scripts.gate: npm run lint && npm run gate:backend && npm run gate:frontend
scripts.gate:e2e: cd web && npm run e2e && cd ../packages/doc && npm run test:e2e
